claims.summary: PI integral buildup can persist after the originating error reverses.
claims.disposition: Verified conditional anti-windup and saturation-aware partial integral decay.

claims.summary: The gate/filter tail needs bounded recovery memory.
claims.disposition: Verified configurable universal integrator leak and actuator clamps.

claims.summary: Pressure, viscosity, and tail leakage should be traced together.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded regulator cartography comparison.

claims.summary: Ki, integrator leak, or band-stop/filter tuning may change the tail.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because these values directly alter live controller behavior.
